MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: JOSEPH SACRAMENTO FOR PLAINTIFF PRIMO SEGUNDO. PROPERTY MANAGER JAY BLISS ALSO PRESENT
ORA PROCHOVNICK SPECIALLY APPEARING AS LIMITED SCOPE REPRESENTATION FOR DEFENDANT JAUCESES GALDO ALSO PRESENT.

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. CASE SETTLED. TERMS OF STIPULATION PLACED ON RECORD AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT TO REMAIN IN POSSESSION OF 805 LEAVENWORTH #409.DEFENDANT TO PAY $8184.14 ($7384.14 AS BACK RENT AND $800 ATTORNEY FEES AND COSTS). $784.14 DUE ON 5/20/05. $908.17 ($858.17 APPLIED TO CURRENT RENT, AND $50 APPLIED TO BACK RENT)DUE ON 6/3/05 AND ON THE 3RD OF EACH MONTH, THEREAFTER. $800(PARTIAL PAYMENT OF BACK RENT) DUE ON 6/17/05
AND ON THE 17TH OF EACH MONTH UNTIL PAID. PAYMENTS TO BE MADE BY MONEY ORDER OR CASHIERS CHECK. IF PAID IN FULL, PLAINITFF WILL FILE A DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE.
IN THE EVENT OF DEFAULT PLAINTIFF MAY FILE BY EXPARTE APPLICATION, WITH 24 HOUR NOTICE, FOR JUDGMENT FOR POSSESSION AND BACK RENT STILL OWING.
ALL PARTIES AGREE TO A MUTUAL RELEASE OF ALL CLAIMS. IF DEFENDANT DEFAULTS, PLAINTIFF MAY APPLY BY EXPARTE APPLICATION WITH 24HOUR NOTICE FOR JUDGMENT FOR IMMEDIATE POSSESSION.NO STAY OF EXECUTION ALLOWED, AND THIS IS BINDING TO ALL HEIRS AND SUCCESSORS.
